May 29, 2002 CONTENTS: SoftImage Licensing Tutorials SoftImage XSI v 1.5 ("Minorca") SoftImage XSI v 2.0 ("Ibiza") Additional Manuals and CDs SoftImage --------- SoftImage from Avid Technology, Inc is installed on the Win2K systems in

hnology, Inc is installed on the Win2K systems in 349 Soda for use by specific EECS classes, including CS184, CS285 and CS294. The software and licenses were donated by Avid in November 2000 and renewed in May 2002 through the efforts of Pr

and renewed in May 2002 through the efforts of Profs Brian Barsky and James O'Brien. SoftImage is professional quality animation editing software. The SoftImage, Inc WEB site is http://www.softimage.com Licensing --------- SoftImage i

.softimage.com Licensing --------- SoftImage is licensed via a floating license server that runs on an EECS Instructional computer. The license server requires a "dongle". For XSI v 1.5 ("Minorca"), the dongle is a blue Globetrotter FelxLM

norca"), the dongle is a blue Globetrotter FelxLM parallel port key with FlexID = 7-36C7BC4E. For XSI v 2.0 ("Ibiza"), the dongle is a Sentinel Software Protection Manager ("SPM") serial port key with ID = 28257B0147. To run multiple

port key with ID = 28257B0147. To run multiple versions on the same machine, set them (client and server) to use different TCP ports, such as: XSI v 1.5 on port 7002 XSI v 2.0 on port 7003 SI/3D v 3.9 on port 7004 Tutorials ---------

3 SI/3D v 3.9 on port 7004 Tutorials --------- On-line tutorials and product information can be found at http://www.softimage.com and in c:\Softimage\docs on the local disks in 349 Soda. These manuals are in 349 Soda (please do not remov

cense server dongle. We are awaiting licenses. SoftImage XSI v 2.0 ("Ibiza") is also available for download and can be run from an IRIX server without a dongle. Contact Prof Barsky (barsky@cs) or Kevin Mullally (kevinm@eecs) for the login
